gaps.title: Missing os import in Task 7 adjudicator tests
gaps.description: test_adjudicator.py only imports sys and unittest; the plan's Task 7 appended tests reference os.environ.pop() and unittest.mock.patch but these were not imported. Test would fail with NameError.
gaps.fix: Added explicit instruction to prepend 'import os' and 'from unittest.mock import patch' to the existing imports in test_adjudicator.py.

gaps.title: Missing os/patch imports in Task 8 evidence_io tests
gaps.description: test_evidence_io.py imports tempfile, json, unittest, Path, and evidence_io/gate_schema functions but not os or unittest.mock.patch. Task 8 appended tests need both.
gaps.fix: Added explicit instruction to prepend 'import os' and 'from unittest.mock import patch' to the existing imports in test_evidence_io.py.

gaps.title: clear_gate_marker not guarded by assert_host_context
gaps.description: Task 8 guards write_gate_marker, persist_evidence_record, and persist_gate_file, but clear_gate_marker (a destructive write — deletes the crash-safety marker) was not guarded. Per spec §9.2, only the orchestrator host should clear markers during crash recovery. Inconsistent with all other write operations being guarded.
gaps.fix: Added clear_gate_marker guard to Task 8 implementation steps and a test_clear_gate_marker_raises_in_child test case.

coverage_notes.spec_requirement: §7 — collectors run on orchestrator host, never by generation child
§7 — evidence + gate files written outside child's tmux working tree
§7 — child's self-reports are unverified hints (Blind Hunter)

coverage_notes.status: covered (already implemented in adjudicator.py from M2)

coverage_notes.spec_requirement: §8 module 6 — sandbox the generation child (env var stripping)
§8 module 6 — audit P0s for gate operations
§16 M16 — no dependencies on other milestones
coverage_notes.status: verified — plan uses only existing M1/M2 APIs

behavioral_changes.change: _spawn_legacy will now strip BASH_ENV= via sandbox_tmux_env_args, which it did not previously strip inline
behavioral_changes.impact: More secure — tightens the child sandbox. No regression risk since BASH_ENV stripping is already applied by _spawn_runner.

deferred_to_later_milestones: GateDecision + GateRendered telemetry events (M18 owns telemetry_events.py delta)
GateProfileDrift audit event for profile hash mismatch (M19)
CLI commands: gate status, gate resume, gate invalidate (M19)
